Event: Darkness Castle Siege Oct 2024
Event Date: 10/10/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: AR13


Other locations the gear can be found
Siege Saboteur Chest
Green Lacemaker Gear

The unit's crit is increased by 25% for the duration of the battle.

Critical attack deals an extra 160000 physical damage to the target and all enemies in a small radius around it, and restores health to the unit equal to 80% of the damage dealt by the ability. Also, the armor wearer increases own health, damage, physical armor piercing, as well as physical and magic armor by 20% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌚
